sourceSummary.oneLine: Test report for detector interface testing of HAD1417MCW with feel-DRCS software.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents detector connection, readiness, acquisition message, image storage, and disconnection checks performed by two testers and confirmed on 2020.07.14.
keyPoints: Test environment used Windows 10 Professional English 64bit after latest updates.
Both testers recorded OK results for detector connection, detector ready command, messages from detector, image check, and detector disconnection.
The report includes references to detector connection, detector log, detector calibration data, and connected detector status checks.

evidence.claim: The document is a test report titled Detector Interface Test : HAD1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText:
Test Report

Title

Detector Interface Test : HAD1417MCW

evidence.claim: The test environment used Windows 10 Professional English 64bit after latest updates.
evidence.evidenceText: OS : Windows 10 Professional English 64bit after latest updates

evidence.claim: The installed software version was feel-DRCS V2.1.255.20.
The detector under test was one HAD1417MCW unit.
The X-ray trigger setting was Auto Trigger.
The software installation method was to install software by the feel-DRCS manual and check the interface with software and detector.
evidence.evidenceText:
Install S/W by feel-DRCS Manual

Check interface with S/W and Detector.

evidence.claim: Two testers were used for cross-checking.
Tester 1 Kim Wan Soo approved the test on 2020.07.13.

Tester 1

evidence.evidenceText:
Tester 2

evidence.claim: Lee Dong Jin confirmed the report on 2020.07.14.
Detector connection, detector ready command, detector messages, image check, and detector disconnection were marked OK by both testers.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text.
No document revision or version is stated; the only version present is the installed software version.
No standards are cited in the source text.
Document date is inferred from the confirmation date 2020.07.14; tester approval dates are 2020.07.13.
Some tabular content is flattened in the preprocessed text, making detailed row-to-column traceability medium confidence for checklist results.
